strName.description: The code name of the loot entry, as referred to in other files.

strType.description: Enum tag dispatching to game code (condition, item, trigger, interaction, condrule, lifeevent, ship, repeat, surviveo2, ...). NOT a strName reference; render as a badge on detail pages and use to route aCOs targets per the type-routed-refs design.

aCOs.description: Condition strings (Name=chance x min-max) applied by this loot entry. Target folder is type-routed by sibling strType (conditionâ†’conditions, itemâ†’condowners, triggerâ†’condtrigs, interactionâ†’interactions, condruleâ†’condrules, lifeeventâ†’lifeevents, shipâ†’ships); the v1 fallback treats them as refs to entry within conditions.json which catches the most common case.

aLoots.description: Nested loot entries; each refers to entry within loot.json
